title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MakeMyTrip - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MakeMyTrip - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? MakeMyTrip in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MakeMyTrip:
MakeMyTrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip!
